## Phase [N] — [Phase name]

Work through `0N-phase-N-name.md` in order. Tick each item as you complete it. Open the PR only when every box is ticked.

### Checklist

Copy the checklist from the phase document here and tick items as you complete them.

### Notes

Add anything worth recording as you work — blockers you hit, decisions you made, things that surprised you.
